text: DESPERATELY, YOU TEAR YOUR SHIRT OFF AND TIE IT TO YOUR WRISTS AND WAIST. BALANCING PRECARIOUSLY AT THE PROW, YOU FEEL THE WIND CATCH THE FABRIC. THE BILLOWING SHIRT IS TORN TORIBBONS, BUT NOT BEFORE YOU SAILSAFELY TO THE OPPOSITE SHORE! SIDURI WELCOMES YOU FREELY INTO HER COMFORTABLE HOME AND SPEAKS TO YOU OF YOUR QUEST. "UTNAPISHTIM CANNOT GIVE YOU THESECRET OF IMMORTALITY. THE GODSGAVE MAN DEATH FOR HIS PORTION. EAT, DRINK AND BE MERRY. FOR THAT YOU WERE BORN." YOU USE THE WOOD HERE TO MAKEYOURSELF A CRUDE BOAT. IT JUST MIGHT LAST LONG ENOUGH TO CROSS THE OCEAN, BUT PROBABLY WON'T HOLD PAST THAT. ROUGH WAVES SPLASH IN MUCH OF THE OCEAN SAVEFOR NEAR THE SHORES AND IN A CORRIDOR BETWEEN THE PENINSULAS. DIPPING YOUR CEDAR POLE INTO THE DEADLY WATER, YOU ARE ABLE TO PUSH YOURSELF FORWARD. THE POLE IS NOW GLISTENING WITH DROPS OF THE POISONOUS OCEAN, SO YOU DROP YOUR POLE IN THE SEA. BETTER TO LOSE A POLE THAN TO GIVE UP YOUR LIFE! URSHANABI, THE FERRYMAN, IS HAPPY TO SEE YOU, AS HE RARELY HAS VISITORS -- MORE THAN ONCE. "YES, YOU CAN REACH THE SAGE UTNAPISHTIM ACROSS THE OCEAN TO THE RIGHT OF HERE, BUT TAKE ALL YOU CAN TO PROPEL YOUR BOAT. THE WATER IS DEADLY TO TOUCH." "I, UTNAPISHTIM, SAVED MY KIN AND CATTLE FROM THE GREAT FLOOD THAT LASTED 7 DAYS AND NIGHTS. FOR THIS, THE GODS BROUGHT ME ALONE TO DILMUN. I CAN GIVE YOUNO SECRET TO IMMORTALITY. THE ETERNAL LIFE I POSSESS IS JUST ASPECIAL GIFT OF THE GODS." AS YOU DEPART, UTNAPISHTIM THINKS OF SOMETHING TO TELL YOU."THERE IS A PLANT THAT CAN CURE WOUNDS AND MAKE A PERSON YOUNGERAGAIN. THE GRAY-GROW-YOUNG BUSHGROWS ONLY ON AN ISLAND NORTH OFHERE, BUT YOU MUST SEARCH HARD FOR IT. IT IS A RARE PLANT." YOU REACH FOR YOUR SECOND DRY CEDAR POLE, AND USE IT TO MOVE ALITTLE FURTHER INTO THE OCEAN OFDEATH. THE SMELL OF THE OCEAN MAKES YOU FEEL FAINT, BUT NOT SOCONFUSED THAT YOU TOUCH YOUR WETAND DEADLY POLE. THIS ONE TOO IS DISCARDED IN THE STILL WATER. AFTER A CAREFUL SEARCH OF THEISLAND, YOU TAKE A CLOSER LOOK AT A BUCKTHORN? BUSH ENCOUNTEREDEARLIER. TOUCHING IT, YOU PRICKYOURSELF ON A THORN. STRANGE IMAGES OF CROCODILES AND GIANT POINTED BUILDINGS COME TO MIND. "THE GATES, THE GATES, ... " WITH YOUR LAST REMAINING CEDARPOLE, YOU PUSH ONWARD. THE SEA AHEAD LOOKS DEEPER - PERHAPS IT WOULDN'T BE POSSIBLE TO POLE THEBOAT ANY FURTHER ANYWAY. WITH AWORRIED MIEN, YOU ALLOW THE LASTCEDAR POLE TO SLOWLY DRIFT AWAY IN THE BECALMED WATERS. THE WATER HERE IS FAIRLY SHALLOW, BUT YOU HAVE NOTHING WHICH WILL REACH BOTTOM. YOU ATTEMPT TO PADDLE YOURSELF TO SAFETY, BUT A FEW DROPS OF THE DEADLY SEA SPLASH ON YOU. THE TOXIC FLUID ATTACKS PAINFULLY BUT WITH MERCIFUL RAPIDITY. THE TUNNEL SEEMS NONE TOO WELL BUILT. AS YOU DUCK INSIDE,A LARGE ROCK ROLLS DOWN THE SIDEOF THE MOUNTAIN IN A CLOUD OF SMOKE, BLOCKING THE ENTRANCE. CAREFULLY FEELING YOUR WAY THROUGH THE TUNNEL, YOU SHOULD ARRIVE SAFELY AT THE OTHER END. YOU CAN SEE THAT THE CAVE YOU ARE ENTERING IS WELL KEPT, WITH MANY DRIED HERBS STORED IN CLAY BOWLS AND REED BASKETS. A KINDLY WISE LOOKING WOMAN IS STANDING IN A CORNER NEXT TO HER TABLE, HUMMING A CHEERFUL TUNE THAT SOUNDS FAMILIAR. "I REALLY DON'T MIND YOU SIDLING ON BY ME LIKE THAT," SAYS THE HUNTER, "BUT IF YOU WOULD GIVE ME A STATUE OF THE MOTHER GODDESS, I WOULD BE VERY GRATEFUL. JUST DROP IT ON ME ANYTIME, AND I'LL REWARD YOU AS BEST I CAN." THE MEDICINE WOMAN SEEMS TO WORK NEW LIFE INTO THE OLD BONE YOU BROUGHT HER, AS SHE CARVES IT INTO SHAPE WITH A VARIETY OF SHARP PIECES OF FLINT. FINALLY,SHE REVERENTLY OFFERS THE STATUEOF THE MOTHER GODDESS TO YOU. "LIFE IS EVER REBORN ANEW." "SO YOU SEEK ETERNAL LIFE?", SAYS THE MEDICINE WOMAN. "DO YOU NOT KNOW THAT AFTER EACH WINTER THE SPRING COMES AGAIN? IF YOU DROP AN ANIMAL BONE ON MY TABLE, I WILL HAPPILY MAKE YOU AN IMAGE OF GREAT MOTHER SO YOU MAY NEVER FORGET HER." THIS TEMPLE IS CONSECRATED TO THE GREAT GOD SHAMASH. ALL WHO WISH TO APPROACH THE ALTAR MUST PERFORM THE SACRED RITES OFPURIFICATION BY READING THE HOLYPRAYER OF SHAMASH, UTU AND RE, AND THEN WALK DIRECTLY TO THE ALTAR. SHAMASH IS A GREAT GOD. HE GIVES COURAGE TO A PERSON EVEN WHEN THREATENED WITH TERRIBLE BEASTS AND DEMONS. SHAMASH IS AJUST GOD, WHO WILL REWARD THOSE WHO BRING HIM THE PROPER GIFTS. ANY GIFTS FOR SHAMASH SHOULD BE LEFT AT THE INNER SANCTUM ALTAR. THE HONEY DISAPPEARS FROM THEHOLY ALTAR OF SHAMASH. MUSICAL STRAINS OF ENCHANTING LOVELINESSSURROUND YOU. BEFORE YOU ON THEALTAR APPEARS A SHINING AMULET, WITH AN IMAGE OF THE SUN GOD ON ITS FACE. A BOOMING VOICE SAYS, "FEAR NO MORE!" PRAYERS TO SHAMASH, UTU, RE MAY THE GODS BRING US GOOD HARVESTS AND MANY CHILDREN. EENY, MEENY, MINY, MO. YOU OPEN UP AN OLD DUSTY CHEST IN THE CENTER OF THE ROOM.A SMALL CLOUD OF DUST BLOWS INTOYOUR FACE FROM SOME FUNGUS IN THE BOX. YOU DON'T FEEL ANY THEWORSE, BUT ARE DISAPPOINTED TO FIND ONLY AN OLD DIRTY SHIRT. WELL, TAKE IT OR LEAVE IT. TO THOSE WHO HAVE SEEN THESE WORDS BELONGS THE AWESOME POWER TO EXTINGUISH FIRES WITH BUT THE USE OF A SIMPLE PRAYER TO BAAL, GOD OF RAIN. KNOW WELL HOWEVER THAT BAAL HAS NO POWER IN THE UNDERWORLD. HELL'S FIRE CANNOT BY BAAL BE ABATED. INSIDE THE CHEST IS A WELL CRAFTED THROWING AXE. THERE IS AN INSCRIPTION ON THE HANDLE WHICH READS, "DRIVER - GIVEN ITS POWER BY SIR ADROIT AND CUNNING." THE RIGHT SIDE OF THE TEXT ISCOMPLETELY WORN. YOU CAN READ: WHEN ONE MUST DRINK W IN THE DESERT, ONE M SPEAK FIRST THE SHA SPELL. THERE IS AN INSCRIPTION ON THE HANDLE OF AN EXQUISITELY CRAFTED HAMMER AXE. IT READS, "A BLUDGEON FASHIONED BY SIR ADROIT AND CUNNING". THE AXE IS PRECISELY BALANCED TO IMPROVE ACCURACY IN ITS USE AS A POWERFUL THROWN WEAPON. "THE GODS ON HIGH FOUGHT AND QUARRELED OVER WHO SHOULD RULE OVER EARTH AND WHO SHOULD KEEP SOVEREIGNTY OVER THE AIR. YAM THE POWERFUL DRAGON WAS CAST DOWN TO EARTH BUT CAN NOT BE DEFEATED EXCEPT BY A WEAPON OF SIR ADROIT AND CUNNING'S." OH, WOE FILLS THE LAND OF ASSUR. WOULD THAT WE ONLY HAD THE TROLLS TO WORRY ABOUT! WE HAVE BEEN THE PLAYGROUND OF AN INVINCIBLE DRAGON, A STATUE OF AWINGED BULL ON THE LIBRARY STEPSHAS COME TO LIFE, AND I DARE NOTSPEAK OF THE FEARFUL HUMBABA! IN REMEMBRANCE OF THE ROYAL LIBRARY DOORMAN, WHO SERVED HIS LORD AND KING WELL, UNTIL THE DAY SHAMASH CHOSE TO MAKE ONE OF THE STONE STATUES OF SHEDU COME TO LIFE. DOORMAN UTI WAS CARRIED AWAY TO THE DEEP FOREST WITH HIS COPY OF THE ROYAL KEY. BLESSINGS ON YOU, MY FRIEND.YOU HAVE BROUGHT THE ROYAL KEY BACK TO ASSURBANIPAL'S GREAT LIBRARY OF KNOWLEDGE. TO THANK YOU, I HAVE BEEN AUTHORIZED BY THE KING HIMSELF TO TEACH YOU THE SHABRIRI SPELL IF YOU LEAVE THE KEY ON THE TABLE NEXT TO ME. GILGAMESH, THE GREAT HERO, BORN AND RAISED IN WILD FORESTS,TAMED BY THE GENTLE GUILES OF A VILLAGE MAIDEN, SET OUT ACROSS THE SEVEN MOUNTAINS FROM HIS CITY OF ERECH IN SEARCH FOR THE SECRET OF ETERNAL LIFE TO REVIVEHIS DEAD FRIEND ENKIDU. ONE MAN ONLY IN THE HISTORY OF BABYLON AND SUMER LIVES FOR ALL ETERNITY. UTNAPISHTIM, WHO SAVED HUMANITY FROM THE GREAT FLOOD THAT DEVASTATED THE WORLD IN SEVEN DAYS AND NIGHTS, LIVES NOW FAR AWAY PAST THE ENCHANTINGDISTRACTIONS OF SIDURI'S GARDEN. SOME GODS CALL ON MAN TO GIVE HIS BEST ANIMALS FOR SACRIFICE, AND A FEW DEMAND HUMAN BLOOD. OTHER GODS WANT RICHES, GOLD, AND FINERY LAID AT THEIR ALTAR. THE GREAT GOD SHAMASH PREFERS THE SWEET NECTAR OF NATURE'S OWNBEASTS TO ANYTHING MADE BY MAN. THE GRAY-GROW-YOUNG PLANT YOU PLACED ON THE ALTAR DISSOLVES INA SWIRLING MIST OF VAPORS, AND YOUR MIND FILLS WITH MEMORIES OFYOUR PAST LIVES. PAST LIVES?!! "HERE IS YOUR KEY!", YELLS HAPI,"USE IT RIGHT AWAY OR YOU MAY NEVER HAVE THE CHANCE AGAIN!" YOU ARE A BIT TAKEN ABACK WHENYOU SEE THAT THE "PERSON" YOU ARE TALKING TO HAS A FACE LIKE ABABOON. HOWEVER, HE SPEAKS TO YOU KINDLY. "HELLO, I'M HAPI, THE MASTER OF THE NILE. YOU MAYPASS BY AFTER YOU PUT THE PLANT 'GRAY-GROW-YOUNG' ON MY ALTAR." REMEMBER WHAT THE HOLY BOOK SAYS, "NOTHING" IS WORSE THAN THE FIRES OF HELL. "YOU'VE COME A LONG WAY TO GETTHIS FAR. OVER THERE IS ONE OF THE GATES THAT LEAD TO ETERNAL LIFE, OR SO THE PRIESTS SAY. IFYOU WANT MY ADVICE, YOU'LL GIVE UP ON THIS FOOLISH QUEST AND SWIM BACK TO THE MAINLAND BEFOREIT'S TOO LATE." YOU CAN HEAR A MELODY FROM YOURPAST AS A LARGE BLOCK OF STONE APPEARS BEFORE YOUR EYES. IT TURNS SLOWLY IN THE AIR. AS THEBLOCK DISSOLVES, IT SEEMS AS IF THE BARRIER BETWEEN YOURSELF ANDTHE REALM OF THE DEAD DISSOLVES WITH IT. YOU FEEL AT HOME HERE. RAPTUROUSLY ENTERTAINED BY A CHORUS OF YOUR PAST LIVES GIVINGA JOYFUL RENDITION OF YOUR LIFE AND STRUGGLES, YOU ARE TAKEN TO A LAND OF MILK AND HONEY WHERE YOU ARE BORN AGAIN. WISER NOW, YOU MAY RETIRE WITH HONOR OR MOVE ONWARD TO MORE ADVENTURING. YOU HAVE FOUND "THE SEALED THING IN DARKNESS WITH FIRE ABOUT IT." THE ESSENCE OF OSIRIS HIMSELF REJUVENATES YOU. YOU CAN FEEL A NEW BODY FORMING ABOUT YOUR DISEMBODIED SPIRIT, BRINGING YOUR SEVEN SOULS BACK TOGETHER FROM THEIR WANDERINGS. A THICK LAYER OF DUST COVERSTHE LID OF THE SMALL CHEST. YOUNERVOUSLY PRY THE LID OPEN WITH YOUR EAGER FINGERS, PRAYING THATTHIS IS THE END OF YOUR QUEST. THE LID SPRINGS OPEN AND REVEALSA GOLDEN SHINING LIGHT AT THE END OF A NARROW TUNNEL. THE GOD OSIRIS LIES AHEAD. LET NOT THE FAINT OF HEART APPROACH HIM. TURN BACK IF YOU HAVE LOST THE STOMACH FOR THE STRUGGLE, AND DESPAIR OF YOUR SEARCH FOR ETERNITY. TAKE THIS DOOR BACK TO THE LAND OF EGYPT WHILE YOU CAN! PRAISE BE TO EA, GOD OF WISDOM, WHO HAS PROCLAIMED TO BABYLON, "IN A FAR AWAY COUNTRY ARE THOSE OF OTHER BELIEFS WHO HAVE TAKEN THE HOLY EMBLEMS OF THE THREE GREAT SHAPES, AND USED THEM AS PROFANE KEYS OF PASSAGE THROUGH A MYSTERIOUS TRIO OF GATES." "OH, WON'T YOU PLEASE HELP A POOR WOMAN MAKE A MEAGER LIVING FOR HER STARVING FAMILY? WITH GREAT LABOR HAVE I MADE COPIES OF AN OLD BROKEN TABLET THE KIND KING ASSURBANIPAL LENT ME. DROP A FEW QA OF BARLEY ON MY TABLE AND I WILL GIVE YOU ONE." YOUR HAND PASSES THROUGH THE AIR AS THE IMAGE IN FRONT OF YOUEXPLODES INTO FRENETIC ACTIVITY.THE HANDS OF THE SPIRIT WAVE AT THE TABLE AND AT A SPACE ON ITS FACE WHERE A LIVING BEING WOULD HAVE A MOUTH. NOT A SINGLE WORDOF EXPLANATION DOES IT OFFER! ONLY ONE WHO HAS GONE PAST THE FIRST GATE CAN POSSIBLY ATTAIN PASSAGE THROUGH THE THIRD GATE. FEW INDEED MAY GO SO FAR AS TO COME INTO THE PRESENCE OF OSIRIS HIMSELF, BUT GREAT HONOR WILL BE GIVEN TO THE BRAVE OF HEART WHO DO. MAY ANY WHO DARE TO ENTER THIS TOMB BE CURSED BY THEIR VERY SELVES. "ALL PRAISES TO YOU, O GREAT OSIRIS. MAY YOU GUARD MY SEKHU,MY VERY REMAINS, FROM THIEVES. LET MY EMBALMING KEEP MY BODY READY FOR ITS AFTERWORLD JOURNEYAND MAY I BE ENTITLED TO KEEP THE HONORIFIC OSIRIS BEFORE MY NAME." OSIRIS SETHOS. WITH SOME FEAR OF THE CURSES ALL GRAVE ROBBERS ARE REPUTED TORECEIVE, YOU SLIDE THE HEAVY LIDOF THE COFFIN ONTO THE FLOOR. IT SHATTERS AS IT FALLS. INSIDETHE CASKET YOU SEE ... NOTHING! APPARENTLY, YOU AREN'T THE FIRSTTO BREAK INTO THIS TOMB. IN MEMORY OF HER HOME, IN HONOR TO HER OLD GODS, AND TO PROVIDE HER WITH POWER IN THE AFTERWORLD, THE QUEEN COMMANDED THAT THESE WORDS BE INSCRIBED INHER CHAMBER. "CHANGE THE DARKNESS INTO BRIGHT GODS OF LUXOR, BRING ME LIGHT." THE MOUTH OF THE SPIRIT FLOATSINTO THE AIR, BECOMING A LARGE GLOWING SPHERE, TURNING SLOWLY IN THE FETID AIR. IT SHRINKS AND ATTACHES ITSELF TO THE INDEXFINGER OF THE SPIRIT. HE LIFTS HIS STILL GLOWING DIGIT TO TOUCHYOU, LEAVING A CIRCULAR SCAR. "AH, I CAN SPEAK AGAIN. I HAVEBEEN CURSED TO NEVER KEEP MY MOUTH FOR MORE THAN A MINUTE BUTTHAT BRIEF RESPITE IS SHEER JOY.IN A MOMENT I WILL SHOW YOU MY GRATITUDE. REMEMBER, AS I LOSE MY SPEECH ONCE AGAIN, 'BY MY TOUCH MAY YOU PASS THE MIDDLE.'" PRAISES BE TO HORUS. MAY SET AND HORUS LOOK DOWN WITH FAVOR ON ME, THY HUMBLE SERVANT. MAY I REMAIN TRUE TO MY VOWS OF CELIBACY AND PURITY. MAY I NEVER APPROACH THY ALTAR, KNOWING THAT ONLY THE HIGH PRIEST MAY DO SO. ONE OF THE MYSTERIES IN THE HOLY BOOK OF HORUS IS THAT "ON ONE'S FIRST ARRIVAL IN THE ENDLESS CAVERNS, IT IS THEREAFTER RIGHT THAT ONE SHOULD GO UP TO DISCOVER THE RIGHT WAY TO PROCEED." "WELCOME TO THE SINAI. I HAVEJUST THE THING FOR ADVENTURERS HERE - PURE FRESH WATER, FOR A PRICE, OF COURSE. I'LL SETTLE FOR, SAY, A QUARTER OF WHAT YOU HAVE (IF YOU HAVE ANY BARLEY). JUST PUT IT HERE ON MY TABLE ANDI'LL GIVE YOU A PORTION." "AH, SO YOU'RE PUSHING AN OLDLADY AROUND, EH? WELL, TAKE THAT, YOU BULLY!", THE OLD WOMANSAYS AS SHE HITS YOU WITH HER CANE. "OH, SO YOU WANT TO KNOW ABOUT THE DESERT, EH? WELL, YOUWILL NEED A CAMEL. IF THE STOREIS OUT, TRY THE ARABIAN DESERT." YOU CAN'T SEE THE EASTERN EDGE OF THE DESERT BUT IT MUST NOT BE TOO FAR AWAY. HERE YOU ARE REALLY THIRSTY, WONDERING WHETHER YOU HAVE ENOUGH WATER TO MAKE IT. PERHAPS YOU HAD BETTER CHECK YOUR SUPPLY RIGHT NOW AND PROCEED ACCORDINGLY. "MAY THE SANDS NEVER CLAIM YOU AND THE SKY BE CLOUDY. I AM AT YOUR SERVICE, READY TO PROVIDE YOUR WATER NEEDS FOR A FEW QA OF BARLEY LEFT ON MY TABLE. I AM SURE YOU KNOW BY NOW THAT A WISE TRAVELER IN THE DESERT STOCKS UP ON WATER." "STEP RIGHT UP. VIEW MORE OF THE MIRACULOUS GIZEH VALLEYS, THE PRIDE OF THE NILE. BRING ALONG A FRIEND OR TWO AS YOU STROLL THROUGH OUR NEXT SIGHT, THE VALLEY OF THE TWO HEROES. REMEMBER GIZEH TO YOUR FRIENDS, AND MAY THE POWER BE WITH YOU." WELCOME TO GIZEH, AND THE FAMOUS MER (OR PYRAMID TO ANY HUNGRY GREEKS OUT THERE). THE GIZEH MERCHANTS HAVE OPENED UP A FEW OF THE MER CHAMBERS FOR PUBLIC VIEWING AS A SERVICE TO VISITORS. CONTRIBUTIONS WILL BE GRATEFULLY ACCEPTED. THE VALLEY SEEMS TO EXUDE POWER. YOU FEEL IT SURGING THROUGH YOUR VEINS AND SINEWS AS YOU GAZE ADMIRINGLY OUT OVER THE BEAUTIFUL VALLEY. WHY, YOU FEEL SO STRONG THAT YOU COULD MOVE MOUNTAINS! OR MAYBE AT LEAST A FEW LITTLE HILLS. THE TUNNEL IS STEEP AND SLIPPERY. YOU TRY TO EDGE FORWARD BUT LOSE YOUR FOOTING AND SLIDE ALL THE WAY DOWN. THE SMALL CAVE SEEMS TO GO NOWHERE. YOU WALK AROUND THE SANDY FLOOR. SUDDENLY, A GAPING HOLE OPENS UP AT YOUR FEET AND YOU ARE SWALLOWED UP IN A SWIRLING CONFUSION OF SAND. WILL YOU EVER RETURN? YOU FEEL A POWER SURGING FROM YOU AS YOU HEAR A RUMBLE IN THE DISTANCE. THERE SEEMS TO BE A CLOUD OF DUST RISING FROM ALL THE WAY ACROSS THE CENTRAL RIDGE OF HILLS. WHAT HAVE YOU DONE? WHERE IS THERE HELP FOR YOU IN THIS FORLORN VALLEY? YOUR FINGERS TRACE THE FINE LINES OF THE MAGIC WRITINGS ON THE WALL. AS YOU DO SO, YOU FEEL A GREAT POWER WITHIN FLOW INTO THE HEIROGLYPHS, AND START A POWERFUL SPELL OPERATING. A RUMBLE SOUNDS FROM ACROSS THE HILLS AND DUST FILLS THE SKY. THE TABLET ONCE FASTENED TO THIS WALL WAS STOLEN BY GRAVE ROBBERS, MAY RA CURSE THEM, BUT TALES SPEAK OF A GATEWAY, A YAM,SAND WHICH BEARS GIFTS, AND A DISTANT LIBRARY. GIZEH MERCHANT ASSOCIATION "TAKE MY KA PAST THE VISIONS OF HEAVEN AND HELL, GREAT RA. LET ME TRAVEL PAST THE THREE GATES TO THE THING SEALED IN DARKNESS SURROUNDED BY FIRE. LET ME HAVE THE STRENGTH TO CONQUER THE FIRE, AND THE COURAGE TO FACE THEE, OSIRIS." "PRAISES TO ATEN, SUN GOD. PRAISES TO PTAH AND SEKHMET, HIS CONSORT, AND TO THEIR SON, IMHOTEP, BUILDER OF THE FIRST OF THE GREAT STONE EDIFICES IN OUR LAND. AS HE BROUGHT HONOR TO THE AUGUST CITY OF SAQQARA, SO MAY MY MER HONOR GIZEH." TO YOU WHO ARE ABOUT TO DIE, I SALUTE YOU! THE ENTIRE MER FADES INTO A MISTY IMAGE SUSPENDED IN THIN AIR. THE TRIANGULAR FACETS TURNSLOWLY, SHRINKING TO A SINGLE GLOWING TRIANGLE THAT IMPRINTS ITSELF ON YOUR FOREHEAD AS YOU STAND MESMERIZED. YOU KNOW YOU CAN NOW PASS THE FIRST GATE. TWO THEN . WALK DIRECTLY YOU DON'T RIGHT. YOU CAME. TO PASS THE FIRST GATE, ONE MUST TAKE A REGAL KEY TO THE GLYPH ROOM. THERE ONE MUST PICK IT UP S. GO RE DROP THE KEY. BETWEEN THE GLYPH TO THE ALTAR. BE SU TOUCH THE ALTAR. STEP LEAVE THE ROOM THE WAY "MANY A HEROIC PERSON HAS VENTURED FORTH FROM ERECH BY THIS ROAD, BUT FEW ARE THEY WHO RETURN. THE JOURNEY OF SEVEN MOUNTAINS BEGINS HERE AND OF ALL WHO HAVE TAKEN THIS PATH, ONLY GILGAMESH HAS EVER RETURNED." I HOPE YOU ARE ENJOYING YOUR EXPLORATION OF OUR LITTLE VALLEYHERE. WE HAVE SOME OF THE BEST HEALING SALVE AROUND. JUST DROPA LITTLE OF OUR RICH RED SOIL ONA WOUNDED FRIEND, AND HE'S SURE TO BE GRATEFUL. IN MY HUT HERE,I'M OFFERING A FEW VALLEY GOODS. A PURPLE AURA OF POWER SHINES ABOUT YOU. YOU COULD TRAVEL GREAT DISTANCES THROUGH THIS OPENING BY MY SIDE AND MAYBE, BY USING YOUR NEW FOUND POWER TO MOVE HILLS, EVEN FORM A NEW BRIDGE BETWEEN TWO DIFFERENT WORLDS OF DIFFERENT TIMES. STRONG INDEED IS THE MAGICAL POWER OF THE HOLY CRAFTSMAN, SIRADROIT AND CUNNING. LET IT BE KNOWN TO THOSE OF FOREIGN LANDS,HOWEVER, THAT HE SHALL NOT ALLOWHIS GREATEST WEAPON TO STRAY TOOFAR FROM HIS BELOVED RIVERS, THETIGRIS AND THE EUPHRATES. MESSAGE 245 OF 254 MESSAGE 246 OF 254 MESSAGE 247 OF 254 MESSAGE 248 OF 254 MESSAGE 249 OF 254 MESSAGE 250 OF 254 MESSAGE 251 OF 254 MESSAGE 252 OF 254 MESSAGE 253 OF 254 MESSAGE 254 OF 254 ARE WE EACH DESTINED TO LIVE FOR ONE BRIEF LIFETIME? CAN ANYPERSON LIVE ETERNALLY, OR LIVE AGAIN? THERE ARE SOME IN THE OLD WORLDS OF BABYLONIA AND EGYPT WHO PROFESS TO KNOW THESE ANSWERS. YOU MAY MEET THEM ON YOUR OWN QUEST FOR ETERNAL LIFE. "I HAVE LOST MY STATUE OF THE MOTHER GODDESS", SAYS THE HUNTER, "PLEASE, IF YOU GIVE ME ANOTHER, I WILL REWARD YOU." THE HUNTER SAYS, "I COULD CATCH NO GAMEWITHOUT THE GODDESS, SO ALL I CAN OFFER YOU IN THANKS IS MY SKILL IN SWIMMING." AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA A LARGE SKELETON, BLEACHED WHITE FROM AGE, LAYS HERE. YOU SUCCESSFULLY FREE ONE OF THE LARGER BONES FROM THE PILE. THE MAGIC-STEALING CROCODILE DRAINS ALL OF YOUR POWER. HE SEEMS QUITE HUNGRY AFTER HIS EXHAUSTING EFFORT. AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA THE HEIROGLYPHICS ON THE WORN STONE TABLET ARE DIFFICULT TO DECIPHER BUT AFTER GREAT EFFORT YOU PREVAIL. THE PICTOGRAMS ARE AN OLD DIALECT AND ARE WORN BADLY. AFTER CAREFUL TIRING STUDY, YOU CAN DECIPHER IT. AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA IT IS VERY DIFFICULT TO READ THE WRITING, WHICH IS SEVERELY ERODED. A STRENUOUS EFFORT AT LAST SUCCEEDS. THE JEWEL SPARKLES ENTICINGLY WITH A LOVELY BRILLIANCE. YOU FEEL ENTRANCED AND RELUCTANT TO TRAVEL ANY FURTHER. AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA THE RED CLAY, KNOWN TO MANY BY THE NAME OF ADAMA, IS REFRESHINGLY COOL AND INVIGORATING TO THE SENSES. THE WITHERING GAZE OF THE HORRIBLE BEAST MAKES YOUR BLOOD RUN COLD AND YOUR LIMBS STIFFEN IN SHEER TERROR. AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA PRAYING TO BAAL, THE GOD OF RAIN, YOU ARE GRATIFIED TO SEE A CLOUD FORM AND WATER POUR DOWN FROM ABOVE. THE GREAT HUMBABA IS GETTING SERIOUS. HE LEVELS HIS GAZE ON HIS ENEMY AND CONCENTRATES ON THE DEATH OF HIS FOE. AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA YOU INTONE THE MAGIC INCANTATION, "SHABRIRI, BRIRI, RIRI, IRI, RI, I AM THIRSTY IN A WHITE CUP." THE COOL DELICIOUS WATER IS REFRESHINGAND VERY SATISFYING. EAGERLY, YOU DRINKIT ALL, AND PRAISE THE GODS OF WATER.
